SCMOREACTIVITIES.Module.Title: SC - More Activities
SCMOREACTIVITIES.Module.Description: A Shattered Codex activity platform for the dnd5e system.
SCMOREACTIVITIES.Settings.DebugLogging.H: Log SC - More Activities lifecycle and diagnostic messages to the browser console.
SCMOREACTIVITIES.Settings.SupportMenu.Hi: Support Shattered Codex development on Patreon.
SCMOREACTIVITIES.Settings.DocumentationM: Open the SC - More Activities documentation wiki.
SCMOREACTIVITIES.Activities.ScSound.Hint: Play an audio file when this activity is used.
SCMOREACTIVITIES.Activities.ScSound.Fiel: Audio source played after the activity is used.
Choose whether the sound plays locally or is broadcast by a GM.
SCMOREACTIVITIES.Activities.ScSound.Warn: Choose an audio file before using this activity.
Only a GM can play this sound for everyone. Playing locally instead.
SCMOREACTIVITIES.Activities.ScMacro.Hint: Run a selected world macro or inline code stored on this activity after it is used.
SCMOREACTIVITIES.Activities.ScMacro.Fiel: Choose a world macro or inline code stored on this activity.
Macro executed with activity, item, actor, usage, dialog, message, results, speaker, and targets in scope.
Inline code is stored on this activity and runs only for GM users when the activity is used.
SCMOREACTIVITIES.Activities.ScMacro.Warn: Choose a world macro before using this activity.
You do not have permission to execute the selected macro.
Only a GM can execute inline macro code.
Add inline macro code before using this activity.
SCMOREACTIVITIES.Warning.UnsupportedSyst: SC - More Activities only supports the dnd5e system.
